description: Comprehensive E2E testing for RIS HR System

tasks.description: Run verification-test.js E2E test script. Start HTTP server on port 8080, execute the test, analyze results. If any tests fail, identify the root cause, fix the source code, and re-run until all tests pass.
Run test-additional-modules.js E2E test script. Execute the test, analyze results. If any tests fail, identify the root cause, fix the source code, and re-run until all tests pass.
Run test-profile-details.js E2E test script. Execute the test, analyze results. If any tests fail, identify the root cause, fix the source code, and re-run until all tests pass.
Run test-scorecard-tab.js E2E test script. Execute the test, analyze results. If any tests fail, identify the root cause, fix the source code, and re-run until all tests pass.
Run test-benefits-tab.js E2E test script. Execute the test, analyze results. If any tests fail, identify the root cause, fix the source code, and re-run until all tests pass.
Review all E2E test results. Verify that all 5 test suites passed with 100% success rate. Generate a summary report of all fixes made.
